name: GLM 5.2
description: GLM 5.2 is Z.AI's latest flagship coding model, now documented for both the GLM Coding Plan and Z.AI's general OpenAI-compatible API configuration flows.

page_notice.markdown: Z.AI now documents `glm-5.2` on the general OpenAI-compatible API path in addition to the GLM Coding Plan materials, but the public pricing table still does not publish a dedicated `GLM-5.2` token-pricing row and the release-notes page still stops at `GLM-5.1`.

details.name: availability
details.value: Public Z.AI docs now show GLM-5.2 in both Coding Plan materials and general OpenAI-compatible setup guidance, including the general API endpoint for standard-plan users.

details.name: context_length
details.value: Z.AI's setup guides document a 1M context configuration for glm-5.2 in supported coding-tool integrations.

details.name: pricing_status
details.value: The current public Z.AI pricing page still does not publish a dedicated standard API token-pricing row for GLM-5.2.
